ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly */,
  "directory" TEXT /* Directory where the assembly is located */,
  "assembly_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly */,
  "expected_version" TEXT /* Expected version of the assembly */,
  "actual_version" TEXT /* Actual version of the assembly */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the assembly was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the assembly */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assembly (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly that has the dependency */,
  "parent_assembly" TEXT /* Parent assembly that the assembly depends on */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the parent assembly that the assembly depends on */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dependency was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly that has the problem */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the problem was identified */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the problem */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the problem was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remediations" (
  "remediation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remediation plan */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem that the remediation plan is for */,
  "remediation_plan" TEXT /* Remediation plan to resolve the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the remediation plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the remediation plan */,
  "applied_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the remediation plan was applied */,
  "applied_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who applied the remediation plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remediation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remediations_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remediations_applied_by FOREIGN KEY ("applied_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, DevOps engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the assembly */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the assembly was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the assembly */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_versions_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "assembly_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly version that has the dependency */,
  "parent_assembly_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent assembly version that the assembly depends on */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dependency was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_dependencies_assembly_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_version_id") REFERENCES assembly_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assembly_dependencies_parent_assembly_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_assembly_version_id") REFERENCES assembly_versions ("version_id")
)
